CustomField.description: Set by FormAnswerScoringTrigger when Scoring_Enabled__c is on at both the org and template level. True when NeuraFormScoringEvaluator(Pass_Criteria__c, Answer__c) returns true, false otherwise. Salesforce Checkbox cannot be nullable; historical answers and answers under non-scoring templates remain false but Points_Earned__c stays null — treat (Passed__c=false AND Points_Earned__c IS NULL) as "not evaluated" for reports.
CustomField.label: Passed
